title: ixora standleyana
intro: Ixora standleyana, also known as the Jungle Geranium, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Australia and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and prevent infection. The health benefits of Ixora standleyana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ixora standleyana include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
